summary: Complete E2E testing of RE'ACTIF PRO CV 3-step flow (Upload->Analyze->Optimize). All features verified working: 10 audit rules with score badges, model suggestion, exactly 3 model types (classique/competences/transversale), DOCX/PDF downloads, and button text 'Optimiser'.

issues: Text says '12 critères professionnels' but API returns exactly 10 audit rules - minor text mismatch

backend_api.GET /api/cv/analyze/status: Returns completed with audit_cv array (10 rules), score_global_cv, modele_suggere, raison_modele
backend_api.Audit rule structure: Each rule has: regle, score (0-10), statut (ok/ameliorable/absent), diagnostic, recommandation
backend_api.modele_suggere: Returns one of: classique, competences, transversale
backend_api.POST /api/cv/generate-models: Accepts model_types with classique/competences/transversale, rejects invalid types
backend_api.Invalid model types: Rejects fonctionnel, mixte, etc. with 400 error

frontend_ui.Model suggestion box: Shows recommended model 'CV Classique' with raison_modele
frontend_ui.3 model cards: Exactly 3 cards: CV Classique, CV Competences, CV Transversal (NOT 4)
frontend_ui.Description text: 'audit complet et une optimisation par IA' present
frontend_ui.Download buttons: Voir/Word/PDF buttons appear for optimized models
frontend_ui.CV Preview panel: Shows structured CV content when clicking 'Voir'

action_items: Minor: Update frontend text from '12 critères professionnels' to '10 critères professionnels' to match actual audit rules count
critical_code_review_comments: Text mismatch: Frontend says '12 critères' (lines 911, 1021 of ParticulierView.jsx) but backend returns 10 rules

test_credentials.existing_data: Has analysis results with audit (score 78/100) and 1 optimized model (classique)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test token data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CV 3-step flow fully verified: (1) Upload CV text triggers analysis job, (2) Analysis returns 10 audit rules with scores/statuts + score_global_cv + modele_suggere from 3 valid types (classique/competences/transversale), (3) Generate-models optimizes selected models and stores DOCX/PDF. Frontend shows correct button text 'Optimiser', exactly 3 model cards, and proper color-coded audit badges.
